sentence: Rizzappointed enough, even your peanemis will not save the evening.

wombos.definition: Let down by someone's rizz — disappointment that lands specifically because the charm-game was weaker than advertised.
wombos.example: You d'aven't held your own — I'm really rizzappointed.

wombos.definition: An obsessive, over-the-top deep-dive analysis of any subject — often a movie, show, event, or cultural moment. The kind of breakdown that goes way further than anyone asked for.
